{% fetchxml roles %}
<fetch version="1.0">
  <entity name="adx_webrole">
    <attribute name="adx_name" />
    <filter><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /></filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>
{% endfetchxml %}

{% fetchxml pages %}
<fetch version="1.0" top="10">
  <entity name="adx_webpage">
    <attribute name="adx_name" />
    <attribute name="adx_partialurl" />
    <filter><condition attribute="adx_publishingstateid" operator="not-null" /></filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>
{% endfetchxml %}

{% fetchxml lists %}
<fetch version="1.0">
  <entity name="adx_entitylist">
    <attribute name="adx_name" />
    <attribute name="adx_entityname" />
    <filter><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /></filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>
{% endfetchxml %}

{% fetchxml snippets %}
<fetch version="1.0">
  <entity name="adx_contentsnippet">
    <attribute name="adx_name" />
    <attribute name="adx_value" />
    <filter><condition attribute="adx_name" operator="eq" value="Footer/Copyright" /></filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>
{% endfetchxml %}
